utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (specified), travel_dates (specified), transportation (only airport_transfers and total_transportation_cost; flight details are missing, so not fully specified), accommodation (hotel, nights, cost per night, total cost; fully specified), activities (listed but missing costs per activity; not fully specified), additional_services (listed with some cost statuses like included/provided/confirmed but not explicit costs; however the requirement is 'any extra services with costs' so costs are missing; not fully specified), total_budget (provides a breakdown and total; fully specified). Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, total_budget = 4. Not fully specified: transportation (missing flight details), activities (missing costs), additional_services (missing costs).

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each item from the final package to the corresponding ground-truth entry. Destination 'Barcelona, Spain' maps to destinations ratings. Accommodation 'Boutique Stay Hotel' corresponds to 'Boutique Stay' in accommodation. Transportation includes 'Airport Taxi' via airport_transfers €80. Activities include 'Montserrat Rock Climbing' which maps to 'Rock Climbing'; 'PADI Open Water Referral Diving Course' maps to 'Scuba Diving Excursion'; 'Barcelona City Walking Tour' maps to 'City Walking Tour'. Additional services list gluten-free meals, professional guides, safety equipment—no exact matches in ground-truth services list, so we only rate what has direct matches.
